title: crassula rupestris subsp. marnieriana
intro: Crassula rupestris subsp. marnieriana, also known as the Jade Plant's more succulent relative, is a type of succulent plant belonging to the genus Crassula. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine, where it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are thought to have various medicinal properties. The health benefits of Crassula rupestris subsp. marnieriana are not as widely documented as other plants, but it is said to be beneficial for digestive issues and may help to reduce fever and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
